params.name: Ymir's Box
params.description:
On Dec 22, 965 AD, the Ymir's Box was stolen by the god Loki.
Ymir's Box is from the primordial giant Ymir, who is said to have mixed the snow and ice of the land of mist with the poisonous water of the river élivágar and placed it in the casket. The Casket has been preserved by the Frost Giants, who plan to open it at the Twilight of the Gods and freeze the entire world, thus ensuring the permanent rule of the Frost Giants.
